channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: America's race categories face a stress test
item.description: The next great civil rights battle may be whether America's old racial categories can keep up with its future. Why it matters: The U.S. is heading tow...

item.title: ABC's legal battle with FCC may reshape press freedom
item.description: The outcome of ABC's dispute with the FCC could establish a key precedent for press freedom and the role of business.

item.title: U.S. and Iran expected to sign agreement electronically on Sunday
item.description: The U.S. and Iran, with Pakistani and Qatari mediators, are set to hold a virtual meeting Sunday to electronically sign a memorandum.

item.title: How Amazon and the White House ended Anthropic's Fable
item.description: Anthropic's Fable 5 AI model was pulled days after release, following an urgent Amazon report that triggered a scramble.
